response.overview: After losing a career-defining fashion opportunity, aspiring queer Latinx designer Carlos begins questioning both his talent and his future. Encouraged by his outspoken best friend and inspired by unexpected moments of connection, he discovers the power of ‘glimmers’—small, magical moments of hope that illuminate life’s path. Set against the vibrant backdrop of queer nightlife, fashion, and chosen family, Glimmer is a heartfelt story about resilience, self-worth, and believing in yourself when everything feels uncertain.
response.title: Glimmer
